info.title: Abp Dev Tools
info.description: A set of tools to make development with ABP easier.

commands.name: switch
commands.description: Switches to ABP Studio version

options.name: --channel
options.description: Channel of ABP Studio to install. Default: beta Default: "stable".

options.name: --force
options.description: Force download and install the package Default: "False".

options.name: --install-dir
options.description: Path to the ABP Studio installation directory. Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio

options.name: --packages-dir
options.description: Path to the ABP Studio packages directory. You can use different folder for caching packages. Using custom folder provides fast version switching.Default: %localappdata%\abp-studio\packages

arguments.name: version
arguments.description: Version of ABP Studio to install. Default: 0.7.6

commands.name: add-package
commands.description: Adds a NuGet package to the project and configures module dependency. Works with any NuGet source configured in nuget.config.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project file (.csproj). Default: searches current directory.

options.name: --version
options.description: Version of the package to install.

options.name: --skip-dependency
options.description: Skip adding module dependency (DependsOn attribute). Default: "False".

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Skip restoring the project after adding the package. Default: "False".

options.name: --all
options.description: Add package to all projects in the solution/folder. Default: "False".

arguments.name: packagename
arguments.description: Name of the NuGet package to add.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Shortcut for dotnet build /graphBuild

options.name: --build-files
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects or solutions will be built.

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: bundle
commands.description: Runs 'abp bundle' command for each Blazor WASM projects recursively.

options.name: --graphBuild
options.description: Graph builds project before running 'abp bundle'. Default: "False".

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: list
commands.description: List projects that needs to run 'abp bundle'.

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory for the command. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Cleans 'bin', 'obj' and 'node_modules' folders recursively.

options.name: --soft-delete
options.description: Move to recycle bin instead of permanent deletion. Default: "False".

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clears the current configuration.

commands.name: database-drop
commands.description: Drops all databases in the working directory

options.name: --package
options.description: Filter projects by direct package reference. Only projects with this package will have their databases dropped.

options.name: --env
options.description: Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments.

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to search for EntityFramework projects. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: env
commands.description: Virtual Environment. You can create virtual envionments and run your applications on pre-built virtual environments without changing any files on your computer.

commands.name: envapp
commands.description: Environment apps that required while development.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Allows managing replacement configuration.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Deploys infrastructural tools to docker. Such as Redis, RabbitMQ, SqlServer etc.

options.name: --password
options.description: Default password for sql images when applicable. Default: 12345678Aa Default: "12345678Aa".

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed output from Docker commands. Default: "False".

arguments.name: appnames
arguments.description: Name of the app. Default: .

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stops previously deployed environment app.

arguments.name: appname
arguments.description: Name of the app.

commands.name: find-file
commands.description: Finds the specified text in the solution.

options.name: --ascendant
options.description: Determined searching direction as 'Ascendant' or 'Descendants'. Default: "False".

arguments.name: searchterm
arguments.description: Text to search.

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Directory to search Default: "".

commands.name: find-port
commands.description: Find and manage process using the specified port

options.name: --kill
options.description: Kill the found process directly without asking Default: "False".

arguments.name: port
arguments.description: Port number to find

commands.name: local-sources
commands.description: Allows managing local sources configuration.

options.name: --path
options.description: Working directory of the command. Probably solution directory. Default: . (CurrentDirectory)

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Options will be asked as prompt when this option used. Default: "False".

arguments.name: projectname
arguments.description: Determines the project to open logs of it.

options.name: --project
options.description: Determines the project to open logs of it.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Options will be asked as prompt when this option used. Default: "False".

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Runs all .DbMigrator projects in folder recursively.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Skipts build before running. Passes '--no-build' parameter to dotnet run. Default: "False".

options.name: --env
options.description: Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments.

options.name: --all
options.description: Projects to run will not be asked as prompt. All of them will run. Default: "False".

options.name: --projects
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: migrations
commands.description: Manages EntityFrameworkCore migrations in multiple projects.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds migration with specified name in EntityFrameworkCore project(s). Used to add bulk migrations to multiple project at the same time.

options.name: --all
options.description: Run the command for all the EF Core projects. Default: "False".

options.name: --projects
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clears 'Migrations' folders from EntityFrameworkCore projects.

options.name: --all
options.description: Run the command for all the EF Core projects. Default: "False".

options.name: --projects
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: recreate
commands.description: Clears existing migrations and recreates an 'Initial' migration for selected EntityFrameworkCore project(s). Optionally drops databases afterwards.

options.name: --drop-database
options.description: Drop databases after recreating migrations (runs EF 'database drop' for selected projects). Default: "False".

options.name: --all
options.description: Run the command for all the EF Core projects. Default: "False".

options.name: --projects
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Prepare the project for the first running on this machine. Creates database, redis, event bus containers.

options.name: --no-config
options.description: Do not create local configuration file. (abpdev.yml) Default: "False".

options.name: --no-env-apps
options.description: Do not start environment apps (containers). Default: "False".

options.name: --no-bundle
options.description: Skip bundling Blazor WASM projects. Default: "False".

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: references
commands.description: Allows managing local sources configuration for switch references to local or remote sources.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Allows managing local sources configuration.

commands.name: to-local
commands.description: Switch csproj project references to local source

options.name: --sources
options.description: Sources to switch to local. Default: all sources. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: to-package
commands.description: Switch csproj local project references back to package references

options.name: --sources
options.description: Sources to switch to package. Default: all sources. Default: .

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: replace
commands.description: Runs file replacement according to configuration.

options.name: --path
options.description: Working directory of the command. Probably solution directory. Default: . (CurrentDirectory)

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Interactive Mode. It'll ask prompt to pick one config. Default: "False".

options.name: --files
options.description: Specific file names to replace. If provided, only these files will be processed. Supports partial match.

arguments.name: replacementconfigname
arguments.description: If you execute single option from config, you can pass the name or pass 'all' to execute all of them

commands.name: config
commands.description: Allows managing replacement configuration.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run all the required applications

options.name: --skip-migrate
options.description: Skips migration and runs projects directly. Default: "False".

options.name: --all
options.description: Projects to run will not be asked as prompt. All of them will run. Default: "False".

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Skips build before running. Passes '--no-build' parameter to dotnet run. Default: "False".

options.name: --install-libs
options.description: Runs 'abp install-libs' command while running the project simultaneously. Default: "False".

options.name: --skip-check-libs
options.description: Skips library installation check before running. Default: "False".

options.name: --graphBuild
options.description: Uses /graphBuild while running the applications. So no need building before running. But it may cause some performance. Default: "False".

options.name: --projects
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of projects will be ran. Default: .

options.name: --env
options.description: Uses the virtual environment for this process. Use 'abpdev env config' command to see/manage environments.

options.name: --retry
options.description: Retries running again when application exits. Default: "False".

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Shows verbose output from the projects. Default: "False".

options.name: --yml
options.description: Path to the yml file to be used for running the project.

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run build. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: switch-to-env
commands.description: Switches to the specified environment.

arguments.name: environmentname
arguments.description: Virtual Environment name to switch in this process

commands.name: test
commands.description: runs 'dotnet test' command recursively.

options.name: --files
options.description: (Array) Names or part of names of solutions will be tested.

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Skips build before running. Passes '--no-build' parameter to dotnet test. Default: "False".

arguments.name: workingdirectory
arguments.description: Working directory to run test. Probably project or solution directory path goes here. Default: . (Current Directory)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Checks for updates

options.name: --apply
options.description: Apply the update if available Default: "False".
